response:
| Pros | Cons |
|------|------|
| **Flexibility in work schedule** – Employees can tailor their day to suit personal productivity peaks and responsibilities. | **Potential for isolation** – Limited face‑to‑face interaction can lead to feelings of loneliness and reduced team cohesion. |
| **Reduced commute time and cost** – No daily travel saves time, money, and lowers stress, while also benefiting the environment. | **Blurred work‑life boundaries** – It can be harder to “switch off” when home and work share the same space, leading to burnout. |
| **Access to a broader talent pool** – Companies can hire the best candidates regardless of geographic location, and employees can work for global organizations. | **Challenges in communication & collaboration** – Remote settings may cause miscommunication, slower decision‑making, and difficulty with complex teamwork. |
